Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Class RiskScore

    • getCategoryScore

      public IRiskScore.ICategoryScore getCategoryScore(IRiskScore.ScoreCategory category)
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore
      Get a specific category's score by enum.
      Specified by:
      getCategoryScore in interface IRiskScore
      Parameters:
      category - The category to retrieve
      Returns:
      Category score, or null if not found

    • getCategoryScore

      public IRiskScore.ICategoryScore getCategoryScore(String categoryKey)
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore
      Get a specific category's score by string key. Works for both built-in categories (e.g., "PROTOCOLS") and user-defined custom categories (e.g., "PCI_COMPLIANCE").
      Specified by:
      getCategoryScore in interface IRiskScore
      Parameters:
      categoryKey - The category key string
      Returns:
      Category score, or null if not found

    • getHostUrl

      public String getHostUrl()
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore
      Host URL that was scored.
      Specified by:
      getHostUrl in interface IRiskScore
      Returns:
      Host URL string

    • getDiagnostics

      public IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic[] getDiagnostics()
      Description copied from interface: IRiskScore
      Diagnostics collected during scoring (rule evaluation failures, data-gathering warnings, etc.). Returns an empty array when scoring completed without issues.
      Specified by:
      getDiagnostics in interface IRiskScore
